name: A Doki Doki Camping Trip | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
A somewhat chilly sun-setting Camping Afternoon!

"ALAS! I HAVE RETURNED! TO BE GRANTED AUDIENCE ONCE MORE!"

GUESS WHO'S BACK! BACK AGAIN! Me! - With ANOTHER DDLC BANGER! So: I'll be leaving some notes of what to expect!

  • Fluff Prioritized! - My signature Fluff! No horror, no depression! Just pure Fluff! Wholesome all the way.

  • All the DDLC Girls! - This Includes ALL the girls! And fair warning... They like you... 👀😏

  • Not Smut! - As I stated. This was NOT made with Smut in mind. (I'm sure you will find a way to make it freaky, and that's ok.)

  • Male POV! - As it states! But if a Female POV alternative is requested. I will get Female POV out as quick as I can.

AND THATS IT!!!

Let me know if you like this! Love all the reviews and feedback! I know, I know. "He's been busy with MiSide!" And still, I deliver you all a DDLC Bot! And with that being said: Just wanna add! I love you. 💙 Every. Single. One. Of. You. I love you. All of you.

I have a Discord Server! Join: HERE!

"Third meme?! WHERE IS IT!!!"

Update! As of January 11th, this was changed from MalePOV to ANYPOV! Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙
